videoSnippet.title: Chess is Cruel! || Hans Moke Niemann vs Aravindh Chithambaram || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Niemann, Hans Moke (2725) - Aravindh, Chithambaram VR. (2700) 
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.02.26

1.e4 d6 2.d4 Nf6 3.Nc3 e5 4.Nf3 Nbd7 5.Bc4 Be7 6.O-O O-O 7.Re1 exd4 8.Nxd4 Ne5 9.Bf1 Re8 10.Bf4 Ng6 11.Bg3 Bf8 12.h3 a6 13.a4 b6 14.Nc6 Qd7 15.Nb4 c6 16.Nd3 Bb7 17.Nf4 b5 18.axb5 axb5 19.Rxa8 Bxa8 20.Nd3 h6 21.b4 Qa7 22.Qa1 Qb6 23.e5 dxe5 24.Nxe5 Bxb4 25.Nxg6 Rxe1 26.Qxe1 Qc5 27.Qa1 Bb7 28.Nb1 Ne4 29.c3 Bxc3 30.Nxc3 Nxg3 31.Bd3 fxg6 32.Qa2+ Kh7 33.Qe6 Nf5 34.g4 Nh4 35.Ne2 Qe5 36.Qxe5 Nf3+ 37.Kg2 Nxe5 38.Be4 b4 39.Nc1 Nf7 40.Nb3 Ng5 41.Bd3 c5+ 42.Kg3 Ne4+ 43.Bxe4 Bxe4 44.Nxc5 Bd5 45.f4 b3 46.Na4 Bc6 47.Nb2 Kg8 48.Kf2 Kf7 49.Ke3 Ke6 50.Kd4 Bg2 51.Nd3 Bxh3 52.Nc5+ Kf6 53.g5+ Kf5
